hero.title: Talk to AI. MiLoro writes for you.
hero.sub: The bottleneck of using ChatGPT, Claude or any AI is typing. MiLoro removes it: hold a key, speak naturally, release. Text appears where your cursor is — AI chat, email, code, anywhere. 100% local: your voice never leaves your machine.
hero.meta: 🇪🇸 Spanish · 🇦🇩 Catalan · 🇬🇧 English · 🇮🇹 Italian · 🇫🇷 French · 🇩🇪 German

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
features.local.text: Audio and transcribed text never leave your machine. GDPR and EU AI Act 2026 compliant by design.
features.offline.text: Works on a plane, with no network, no VPN. Doesn't depend on latency or any third-party service uptime.
features.crossplat.text: One product for Linux, Windows and macOS. Same model, same experience.
features.fair.text: We limit per device, not per account. Deactivate one and activate another whenever you want.
features.models.text: Small for modest laptops. Medium for balanced performance/quality. Large for maximum accuracy.
how.step1: Install MiLoro on your machine. First time it recommends the Whisper model based on your RAM.
how.step3: Hold the key down, speak normally, release.
how.step4: Text appears wherever your cursor is — email, Word, terminal, browser, anywhere.
pricing.sub: Cancel anytime from the dashboard. Full refund if you don't activate within 14 days.
pricing.note: Prices VAT included for EU end consumers. Card or SEPA via Stripe. Businesses with intra-community VAT ID: reverse charge applies.
download.alpha_note: MiLoro is in private alpha. To join the early-testers list, email soporte@miloro.app.
faq.q1.q: Does my voice really never leave my computer?
faq.q1.a: Yes, really. Whisper runs locally on your CPU/GPU. The app only contacts our servers to verify your license (1 ping every 7 days) and, optionally, to send anonymous crash dumps if you authorize it.
faq.q2.q: What happens if I lose internet for a week?
faq.q2.a: MiLoro enters tolerant offline mode for 30 days without asking anything. If after 30 days it can't verify the license, it notifies you and asks to reactivate when you're back online.
faq.q3.q: How much RAM do I need?
faq.q3.a: RAM isn't an issue: MiLoro has models from tiny (39 MB, runs on any laptop) to large for maximum quality (3 GB, ideal on machines with 8 GB+ free). On install, the system detects your hardware and suggests the best model. You can always change it from Settings.
faq.q4.q: Does it work with headphones / USB mics?
faq.q4.a: Yes. MiLoro respects the OS default microphone. Switch the device in your OS settings and MiLoro will follow.
faq.q5.a: Yes, anytime from miloro.app/dashboard. Upgrades take effect immediately (we charge pro-rata). Downgrades take effect at the end of the current period.
faq.q6.q: Why is there a device limit?
faq.q6.a: To keep prices low and avoid mass account sharing. You can deactivate one device and activate another as often as you want from the dashboard.
faq.q7.a: From miloro.app/dashboard → Subscription → Cancel. You keep access until the end of the paid period. No questions, no aggressive retention.
faq.q8.a: Yes, automatic receipt after each charge sent to your registered email. For invoices with a company tax ID, mention it at signup or email billing@miloro.app.
footer.alpha_note: Private alpha — privacy, terms and refunds: legal documentation in preparation.
